name: SMART Goals
description: A framework for setting effective and achievable goals: Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound.

name: GROW Model
description: A simple yet powerful coaching model used to structure conversations and facilitate problem-solving: Goal, Reality, Options, Will.

name: Five Dysfunctions of a Team
description: Patrick Lencioni's model outlining common pitfalls that hinder team effectiveness: Absence of Trust, Fear of Conflict, Lack of Commitment, Avoidance of Accountability, Inattention to Results.
